title: Thesis Collection Launcher
genericDescription: Curate ten thesis microgames as one portfolio work; guide audience interpretation; prepare for professional presentation.
specificDescription: Build a playable launcher, website, exhibition menu, or anthology wrapper containing all ten thesis microgames or links to them. Include project statements, credits, accessibility notes, and a 1,500 to 2,000 word thesis reflection.
gradingRubric: 30 pts collection curation; 20 pts usability and access; 20 pts quality of thesis framing; 15 pts completeness of documentation; 15 pts final presentation.
